_note: v2 problem-extraction seed. Produced by reading each paper's title+abstract (the LLM step ingest automates at scale when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set). Keyed by OpenAlex work id.

https://openalex.org/W3151748982.problem: Bitcoin's ledger is single-purpose; there is no general-purpose decentralized computer for arbitrary applications.
https://openalex.org/W3151748982.method: A Turing-complete, account-based stateful transaction machine (the EVM) with gas-metered execution.
https://openalex.org/W3151748982.contribution: Generalized the blockchain from a currency ledger to a programmable smart-contract platform.
https://openalex.org/W3151748982.limitation: Gas economics, throughput, and the security of arbitrary contract code.

https://openalex.org/W1969344535.problem: How to formalize and enforce contractual relationships over untrusted public networks.
https://openalex.org/W1969344535.method: Derives design objectives for smart contracts from legal, economic, and security principles.
https://openalex.org/W1969344535.contribution: Foundational definition of the smart contract.
https://openalex.org/W1969344535.limitation: Predates any deployable decentralized execution substrate.

https://openalex.org/W2539190473.problem: Smart contracts contain exploitable bugs that cause irreversible financial loss.
https://openalex.org/W2539190473.method: Documents a taxonomy of security pitfalls and tooling to detect them.
https://openalex.org/W2539190473.contribution: Systematizes smart-contract vulnerability classes and detection.
https://openalex.org/W2539190473.limitation: Detection is incomplete; new vulnerability classes keep emerging.

https://openalex.org/W2517744317.problem: On-chain smart contracts leak transactional data, violating financial privacy.
https://openalex.org/W2517744317.method: Hawk: a framework compiling private contracts to cryptographic protocols (zero-knowledge).
https://openalex.org/W2517744317.contribution: Privacy-preserving smart contracts without exposing on-chain inputs.
https://openalex.org/W2517744317.limitation: Cryptographic overhead and reliance on a minimally-trusted manager.

https://openalex.org/W2392113277.problem: IoT devices need trustless coordination without a central intermediary.
https://openalex.org/W2392113277.method: Analysis of blockchain suitability for IoT, with optimizations and open challenges.
https://openalex.org/W2392113277.contribution: Maps blockchain capabilities onto IoT requirements.
https://openalex.org/W2392113277.limitation: Throughput, latency, and resource constraints of IoT devices.

https://openalex.org/W2803371618.problem: Integrating blockchain with IoT raises unresolved security and reliability issues.
https://openalex.org/W2803371618.method: Survey of blockchain-IoT integration challenges and opportunities.
https://openalex.org/W2803371618.contribution: Catalogs integration challenges, especially data reliability/security.
https://openalex.org/W2803371618.limitation: Survey; no new mechanism or evaluation.

https://openalex.org/W2898069736.problem: Global supply chains lack transparency, traceability, and security.
https://openalex.org/W2898069736.method: Conceptual analysis of blockchain + smart contracts for supply-chain management.
https://openalex.org/W2898069736.contribution: Framework linking blockchain to sustainable supply-chain management.
https://openalex.org/W2898069736.limitation: Conceptual; adoption and integration barriers untested.

https://openalex.org/W2899357412.problem: The energy sector lacks a structured view of where blockchain can help.
https://openalex.org/W2899357412.method: Systematic review of blockchain use cases in the energy sector.
https://openalex.org/W2899357412.contribution: Maps challenges and opportunities for blockchain in energy.
https://openalex.org/W2899357412.limitation: Review; opportunities largely unvalidated in production.

https://openalex.org/W2522448907.problem: Electronic medical records are siloed and patients lack control over access.
https://openalex.org/W2522448907.method: MedRec: blockchain-based access-control and permission management for EMRs.
https://openalex.org/W2522448907.limitation: Scalability and integration with existing health IT.

https://openalex.org/W2754529701.problem: The field lacks a consolidated view of blockchain architecture and consensus.
https://openalex.org/W2754529701.method: Survey of blockchain architecture and comparison of consensus algorithms.
https://openalex.org/W2754529701.contribution: Taxonomy of architecture + consensus with future trends.

https://openalex.org/W2897450989.problem: Blockchain's benefits and challenges are scattered across many domains.
https://openalex.org/W2897450989.method: Survey of benefits, applications, and technical challenges.
https://openalex.org/W2897450989.contribution: Consolidated catalog of blockchain benefits and challenges.

https://openalex.org/W2901598045.problem: Blockchain-based applications lack a systematic classification.
https://openalex.org/W2901598045.method: Systematic literature review across application domains.
https://openalex.org/W2901598045.contribution: Classification of blockchain applications and open issues.

https://openalex.org/W2527800909.problem: Unclear where current blockchain research is concentrated.
https://openalex.org/W2527800909.method: Systematic review of the blockchain research literature.
https://openalex.org/W2527800909.contribution: Maps the state and focus areas of blockchain research.

https://openalex.org/W893234787.problem: Blockchain's significance beyond currency is poorly understood.
https://openalex.org/W893234787.contribution: Vision and taxonomy of blockchain as a computing paradigm.
